    "Metal alloy crowns are durable but less aesthetically pleasing and are often used for back molars.",
    "Porcelain-fused-to-metal crowns are strong with a natural look but may show some metal.",
    "Zirconia crowns are strong, tooth-coloured, and a modern choice for any tooth.",
    "Gingivitis is the earliest and mildest stage of gum disease, characterized by red, swollen, and bleeding gums.",
    "Gingivitis is caused by plaque buildup along the gumline and is fully reversible with proper oral hygiene and professional dental cleaning.",
    "Periodontitis occurs when gingivitis is left untreated and can lead to bone and tissue damage.",
    "Symptoms of gum disease include bleeding gums, red or swollen gums, bad breath, receding gums, deep pockets between teeth and gums, loose or shifting teeth, and pain when chewing.",
    "Risk factors for gum disease include smoking, diabetes, certain medications, hormonal changes, genetic susceptibility, and poor oral hygiene habits.",
    "Braces are orthodontic devices used to correct misaligned teeth and jaws.",
    "Braces consist of brackets bonded to teeth and connected by archwires that apply constant, gentle pressure to move teeth into the correct position.",
    "Treatment with braces typically lasts between 18 months and 3 years.",
    "Clear aligners such as Invisalign are a series of transparent, removable plastic trays used as an alternative to traditional braces.",
    "Clear aligners should be worn 20 to 22 hours per day and removed only for eating, drinking, brushing, and flossing.",
    "Retainers are custom-made devices worn after orthodontic treatment to maintain teeth in their corrected positions and prevent them from drifting back.",
    "Dental sealants are thin, protective plastic coatings applied to the chewing surfaces of back teeth to prevent tooth decay.",
    "Fluoride is a naturally occurring mineral that strengthens tooth enamel and helps prevent cavities.",
    "In-office fluoride treatments are applied as a gel, foam, or varnish during a dental visit and take only a few minutes.",
    "Professional dental cleaning removes plaque and tartar that regular brushing and flossing cannot reach.",
    "Dental X-rays are an essential diagnostic tool that allows dentists to detect problems not visible during a regular oral examination.",
    "Teeth whitening is a cosmetic procedure that uses peroxide-based bleaching agents to lighten the colour of teeth.",
    "In-office whitening produces results in a single appointment, while at-home whitening uses custom-fitted trays and a lower-concentration gel worn for one to two hours a day or overnight.",
    "Whitening results typically last from six months to two years depending on diet, smoking habits, and oral hygiene.",
    "Dental veneers are thin shells of porcelain or composite resin that are custom-made and bonded to the front surface of teeth to improve their appearance.",
    "Veneers can correct the look of stained, chipped, broken, or slightly misaligned teeth.",
    "A toothache may be caused by tooth decay, a cracked tooth, an abscess, gum disease, or an exposed tooth root.",
    "If a permanent tooth is knocked out, it should be picked up by the crown, rinsed gently with water, and either re-inserted into the socket or kept moist in milk or a saline solution.",
    "A dental abscess is a pocket of pus caused by a bacterial infection and requires prompt dental treatment.",
    "A broken or chipped tooth should be covered with dental wax or sugar-free gum to protect the tongue and cheeks, and rinsing with warm salt water helps reduce the risk of infection."
